title: SMP Overlay
description: This texturepack includes everything for MCTiers gamemode SMP.
body:
This texturepack was designed for the MCTiers gamemode SMP. It includes things that make the game cleaner and better for PvP.

# Features

- No fire on screen
- better particles for pvp
- better compact viewmodels for items
- side shield
- small totem pop
- no pumpkinblur
